accept.reason: cached third-party event pages (linguist-vendored fixtures, recorded verbatim) — the sites' own inline scripts carry lint-suppression comments in their markup; these are not our code's suppression decisions and the fixtures must not be edited
the no-eval lint-ignore on line 48 is a deliberate, reviewed test that eval()s a matches() regex built from a URL — a controlled test input, not a quick-path suppression of a real warning

sharedConstants.what: release zip filename — must match between the build script and the thin workflow stubs that pass it to the Claudinite canon workflows (zip_path in release/daily, zip_name in publish/daily)
extension version — one X.Y.Z token per manifest, kept identical across both files (bumped by the daily-release patcher and the human "bump version" flow); regex so it needs no re-pinning on a bump
